name: WilliamOS Next.js + Tauri Migration Kit
primary_rule: Do not rewrite the brain. Wrap, harden, and migrate surfaces gradually.
repo_reality_note: This repository is the realized Next.js operator shell. The Python control plane and Vite Control Center referenced by the WO live in the broader WilliamOS project and are marked [REFERENCED] in the docs.
boundaries: WilliamOS Core (Python control plane) remains the authority.
Next.js renders the operator shell and owns the governance registers in this repo.
Tauri is a native wrapper with no authority; it calls WilliamOS APIs or governed CLI.
Rust is a mechanical local bridge; it holds no governance/policy authority.
One owner per data type; UI layers may cache but never own source of truth.
Secrets live server-side / OS keychain only; never embedded in shells.
Explicit-runtime-only: no silent model fallback, no cloud fallback.
non_goals: Silent model fallback or cloud fallback
Automatic canon promotion, commits, tags, or releases
PWA offline mutation queue or hidden background sync
future_tracks: N2 Next.js parity (/command, /review, /workers as thin governed clients)
